key_learnings: Understanding the role of genes in nutrition management. Genetic variants such as MTHFR, APOE, and FTO significantly alter individual responses to dietary macronutrients and micronutrients.
research_findings: Identified specific gene-nutrient interactions including MTHFR C677T variant affecting folate metabolism, APOE4 allele increasing sensitivity to dietary saturated fat, and FTO variants correlating with obesity risk under high-calorie diets.
current_focus_areas: Research on nutrient metabolomics; expanding the SNP database for personalized dietary recommendations; integrating polygenic risk scores with dietary advice.
